content: The 2025 episodic memory transformer agent can be redesigned to treat its own active learning search gaps as an episodic 'curiosity diary', where unresolved search uncertainties from knowledge-gathering steps are stored as distinct memory episodes rather than discarded. This architecture weights the retrieval of unresolved curiosity episodes higher during open-ended task planning, driving more structured long-term knowledge acquisition than generic curiosity-driven reinforcement learning rewards.
